finding_results.notes: Rewrote Lena's confidentiality offer into spoken, high-pressure local register with contraction ("We'll") and plain phrasing; removed memo/legal diction while preserving Otis's interruption beat immediately after.

summary: Adjusted the trust-negotiation exchange so Lena's misstep lands as natural pressured speech rather than bureaucratic language, while keeping scene leverage and interruption dynamics intact.
